# Fisk AI


> Fisk AI is a AI Harness that turns CLI commands written using [Fisk](https://github.com/choria-io/fisk) - especially those from [App Builder](https://choria-io.github.io/appbuilder/) - into safe and deterministic AI Agents.

## Key Information

- [Agents](https://ai.choria.io/agents/index.md): Create LLM agents from Fisk CLI applications
- [MCP Servers](https://ai.choria.io/mcp/index.md): Serve Fisk application tools over MCP
- [Reference](https://ai.choria.io/reference/index.md): Configuration Reference
- [Design](https://ai.choria.io/design/index.md): How Fisk AI is built: architecture, subsystems, and the flows that tie them together.
